title: Warp Point
description: Set a Warp Point, then teleport to it. Vanilla Survival friendly!
body:
**A Vanilla and Survival friendly way to set a Warp point and teleport to it, featuring immersive particles, sounds and effects!**

## Setting the Warp Point
Sneaking for 2.5 seconds while holding an Eye of Ender in your main hand will set the Warp Point to your current location.
- Be careful, taking damage will cancel this process!
- Unless you are in creative mode, setting a Warp Point will consume one Eye of Ender from your inventory.
- There can only be one active Warp Point - Creating another will override the previous.
## Teleporting to the Warp Point
Sneaking for 10 seconds while holding an Enderpearl in your main hand will teleport you to the Active Warp Point.
- After about 5 seconds, some nausea kicks, increasing with the remaining duration!
- Be careful, taking damage will cancel this process!
- Unless you are in creative mode, teleporting to a Warp Point will consume an Enderpearl from your inventory.

<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>
  
/function warppoint:help
- Will show you this list.

/function warppoint:set
- Sets a new Warp Point, overriding the previous.

/function warppoint:teleport
- Teleport to the currently active Warp Point.

/function warppoint:lock
- Disables the ability to set a new Warp Point in Survival or Adventure Mode. 
Useful in Multiplayer, when you don't want other players to change its location.

/function warppoint:unlock
- Allows players in Survival or Adventure Mode to set a new Warp Point again.

/function warppoint:delete
- Deletes the Current Warp Point.

/function warppoint:uninstall
- Uninstalls the WarpPoint Datapack.
</details>

## Installing as Datapack
As with any datapack, use **/reload** after placing **Warp Point.zip** in the datapacks folder of your world to activate it.

## Feedback
Feel free to give me bug reports, feature ideas or other feedback on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/u9SRbexPwk).
